task:
Someone on Discord installed Moltis, this is a list of feedback. Plan to fix or improve any of his issues:

12:51 PM]David Cumps
:
Sort LLM preferred model list alphabetical
Voice: Local faster-whisper support?
ElevenLabs Scribe, configured, Test: “Error: Invalid constraint”
Add more channels? Slack. (Or add note it can be configured later)
Identity emoji list is cut off
Summary - Tailscale with warning icon, Installed but not connected (didn’t have an option to configure this during setup)
Tailscale serve/funnel does not work with Headscale, can we bind gateway to tailscale ip?
Sandbox mode is available but no container runtime found. Browser sandbox (for sandboxed sessions) requires Docker or Apple Container. -> Docker is installed
Monitoring stays Connecting but doesnt do anything
Trying to delete the template skill returns an error toast with " Failed: Service temporary unavailable. Please try again"
 
[12:58 PM]David Cumps
: Monitoring eventually connects to "Live" ✅
[1:10 PM]David Cumps
: Docker fixed, on mac it didnt add docker to the PATH automatically ✅
[1:12 PM]David Cumps
: It seems it deleted the default tmux skill together with the template skill when I reloaded moltis -- Update, nevermind this is because I was logged out they were not visible 
[1:15 PM]David Cumps
:
If you are logged out, you can still see the preview in the Sessions tab on the left, but the chat window correctly says "vault is sealed"
[1:16 PM]David Cumps
: imho, if you are not logged in, none of the screens should be allowed to be viewed
[1:19 PM]David Cumps
:
if you are not logged in and you go to Identity and change the name and then click the logout icon, the displayed name has changed, this shouldnt be allowed, some for any other settings imho
user_feedback_text:
Someone on Discord installed Moltis, this is a list of feedback. Plan to fix or improve any of his issues:

12:51 PM]David Cumps
:
Sort LLM preferred model list alphabetical
Voice: Local faster-whisper support?
ElevenLabs Scribe, configured, Test: “Error: Invalid constraint”
Add more channels? Slack. (Or add note it can be configured later)
Identity emoji list is cut off
Summary - Tailscale with warning icon, Installed but not connected (didn’t have an option to configure this during setup)
Tailscale serve/funnel does not work with Headscale, can we bind gateway to tailscale ip?
Sandbox mode is available but no container runtime found. Browser sandbox (for sandboxed sessions) requires Docker or Apple Container. -> Docker is installed
Monitoring stays Connecting but doesnt do anything
Trying to delete the template skill returns an error toast with " Failed: Service temporary unavailable. Please try again"
 
[12:58 PM]David Cumps
: Monitoring eventually connects to "Live" ✅
[1:10 PM]Davi

proceed about cleaning bd tasks then
